trans-unit.resname: You might create a sequence of challenges where players won't be able to access a new game or challenge until they obtain a key from previous activity. For this purpose, you might set up an access code as well as a message that will be displayed to players when they reach a fixed percentage of correct answers, which they can use as a password for a new challenge or a following activity.
trans-unit.source: You might create a sequence of challenges where players won't be able to access a new game or challenge until they obtain a key from previous activity. For this purpose, you might set up an access code as well as a message that will be displayed to players when they reach a fixed percentage of correct answers, which they can use as a password for a new challenge or a following activity.
trans-unit.target: Puoi creare una sequenza di sfide in cui i giocatori non potranno accedere a un nuovo gioco o sfida finché non ottengono una chiave dall'attività precedente. A tale scopo, puoi impostare un codice di accesso e un messaggio che verrà visualizzato ai giocatori quando raggiungeranno una percentuale fissa di risposte corrette, utilizzabile come password per una nuova sfida o un'attività successiva.

trans-unit.source: Does water boil at 100 degrees Celsius?

trans-unit.resname: Generate 10 words followed by their definitions, separated by #. Do not include the # character in either the word or the definition.

trans-unit.target: Genera 10 parole seguite dalle loro definizioni, separate da #. Non includere il carattere # né nella parola né nella definizione.

trans-unit.resname: Generate 30 words and their definitions separated by #.
trans-unit.source: Generate 30 words and their definitions separated by #.
trans-unit.target: Genera 30 parole e le loro definizioni separate da #.

trans-unit.resname: Create 10 multiple-choice questions with 2 to 4 options. Start with the correct solution (0, 1, 2, or 3), followed by the question and each option, all separated by #.
trans-unit.source: Create 10 multiple-choice questions with 2 to 4 options. Start with the correct solution (0, 1, 2, or 3), followed by the question and each option, all separated by #.
trans-unit.target: Crea 10 domande a scelta multipla con 2-4 opzioni. Inizia con la soluzione corretta (0, 1, 2 o 3), seguita dalla domanda e da ogni opzione, tutte separate da #.

trans-unit.resname: Generate 10 multiple-choice questions. Provide the correct answer as letters (e.g., A, AB), followed by the question and the options, all separated by #.
trans-unit.source: Generate 10 multiple-choice questions. Provide the correct answer as letters (e.g., A, AB), followed by the question and the options, all separated by #.
trans-unit.target: Genera 10 domande a scelta multipla. Fornisci la risposta corretta come lettere (ad esempio, A, AB), seguite dalla domanda e dalle opzioni, tutte separate da #.

trans-unit.resname: Create 5 solution words followed by 3 to 9 clues that describe each one. Separate each clue with #.
trans-unit.source: Create 5 solution words followed by 3 to 9 clues that describe each one. Separate each clue with #.
trans-unit.target: Crea 5 parole come soluzione seguite da 3 a 9 indizi che descrivano ciascuna. Separare ogni indizio con #.

trans-unit.resname: Provide 4 elements for each of these groups: carnivores, 0, and herbivores, 1. Separate the group number and the element using the symbol #.
trans-unit.source: Provide 4 elements for each of these groups: carnivores, 0, and herbivores, 1. Separate the group number and the element using the symbol #.
trans-unit.target: Fornisci 4 elementi per ciascuno di questi gruppi: carnivori, 0, ed erbivori, 1. Separa il numero del gruppo e l'elemento utilizzando il simbolo #.

trans-unit.resname: Generate 10 true or false questions. Each question must include the solution (0 = false, 1 = true), a suggestion, and feedback, all separated by #. Additionally, the feedback must not explicitly indicate whether the response is correct or incorrect
trans-unit.source: Generate 10 true or false questions. Each question must include the solution (0 = false, 1 = true), a suggestion, and feedback, all separated by #. Additionally, the feedback must not explicitly indicate whether the response is correct or incorrect
trans-unit.target: Genera 10 domande vero / falso. Ogni domanda deve includere la soluzione (0 = falso, 1 = vero), un suggerimento e un feedback, tutti separati da #. Inoltre, il feedback non deve indicare esplicitamente se la risposta sia corretta o errata

trans-unit.resname: Generate 10 questions. The 'Solution' can be 0/1 for True/False, 0-3 for single-choice, or A-D (or combinations) for multiple-choice. Then provide the question and the answer options (2 to 4), all separated by '#'.
trans-unit.source: Generate 10 questions. The 'Solution' can be 0/1 for True/False, 0-3 for single-choice, or A-D (or combinations) for multiple-choice. Then provide the question and the answer options (2 to 4), all separated by '#'.
trans-unit.target: Genera 10 domande. La 'Soluzione' può essere 1/0 per Vero/Falso, 0-3 per scelta singola, o A-D (o combinazioni) per scelta multipla. Poi fornisci la domanda e le opzioni di risposta (da 2 a 4), tutte separate da '#'.

trans-unit.resname: Provide only one ordered list of steps or items, each separated by '#'.
trans-unit.source: Provide only one ordered list of steps or items, each separated by '#'.
trans-unit.target: Fornisci solo una lista ordinata di passaggi o elementi, ciascuno separato da '#'.

trans-unit.target: Genera 10 parole seguite dalle loro definizioni, separate da #. Non includere il carattere # né nella parola né nella definizione

trans-unit.resname: Enter the text for the drop-down activity in the drop-down field either by pasting the text from another source or by typing it directly into the field. To select which words to choose, double-click on a word to select it and click on the button below.
trans-unit.source: Enter the text for the drop-down activity in the drop-down field either by pasting the text from another source or by typing it directly into the field. To select which words to choose, double-click on a word to select it and click on the button below.
trans-unit.target: Inserisci il testo per l'attività a discesa nel campo a discesa, incollando il testo da un'altra fonte o digitandolo direttamente nel campo. Per selezionare le parole da scegliere, fai doppio clic su una parola per selezionarla e fai clic sul pulsante in basso.

trans-unit.resname: Type or paste the text for the fill-in-the-blank activity into the field. Select the words and use the button below to hide them. You can define more than one possible answer using vertical bars to surround and separate them. E.g.: |dog|cat|bird|
trans-unit.source: Type or paste the text for the fill-in-the-blank activity into the field. Select the words and use the button below to hide them. You can define more than one possible answer using vertical bars to surround and separate them. E.g.: |dog|cat|bird|
trans-unit.target: Digita o incolla il testo dell'attività di compilazione nel campo. Seleziona le parole e usa il pulsante qui sotto per nasconderle. Puoi definire più di una possibile risposta usando barre verticali per circondarle e separarle. Ad esempio: |cane|gatto|uccello|

trans-unit.resname: If unchecked, a small number of spelling and capitalization errors will be accepted. If checked, no spelling or capitalization errors will be accepted. Example: If the correct answer is Elephant and it says elephant or Eliphant, both will be considered as "close enough" by the algorithm, as there is only one spelling error, even if "Check capitalization" is checked. If the case check is disabled in this example, the lowercase letter e is not considered an error and eliphant will also be accepted. If "Strict qualification" and "Check capitalization" are enabled, the only correct answer is "Elephant". If only "Strict qualification" is enabled and "Check capitalization" is not, "elephant" will also be accepted.
trans-unit.source: If unchecked, a small number of spelling and capitalization errors will be accepted. If checked, no spelling or capitalization errors will be accepted. Example: If the correct answer is Elephant and it says elephant or Eliphant, both will be considered as "close enough" by the algorithm, as there is only one spelling error, even if "Check capitalization" is checked. If the case check is disabled in this example, the lowercase letter e is not considered an error and eliphant will also be accepted. If "Strict qualification" and "Check capitalization" are enabled, the only correct answer is "Elephant". If only "Strict qualification" is enabled and "Check capitalization" is not, "elephant" will also be accepted.
trans-unit.target: Se non selezionato, verrà accettato un piccolo numero di errori di ortografia e maiuscole. Se selezionato, non verranno accettati errori di ortografia o di maiuscole. Esempio: se la risposta corretta è Elephant e viene scritto elephant o Eliphant, entrambi saranno considerati "abbastanza vicini" dall'algoritmo, poiché c'è solo un errore di ortografia, anche se "Controlla maiuscole" è selezionato. Se il controllo delle maiuscole è disabilitato in questo esempio, la lettera minuscola e non è considerata un errore e anche eliphant sarà accettato. Se sono abilitati sia "Qualificazione rigorosa" sia "Controlla maiuscole", l'unica risposta corretta è "Elephant". Se è abilitata solo "Qualificazione rigorosa" e "Controlla maiuscole" non lo è, anche "elephant" sarà accettato.

trans-unit.resname: If this option is checked, answers submitted with case differences will be marked as incorrect.
trans-unit.source: If this option is checked, answers submitted with case differences will be marked as incorrect.
trans-unit.target: Se questa opzione è selezionata, le risposte inviate con differenze tra maiuscole e minuscole verranno contrassegnate come errate.

trans-unit.resname: Just like a game: Aim for a high score (thousands of points) and try not to lose your lives.
trans-unit.source: Just like a game: Aim for a high score (thousands of points) and try not to lose your lives.
trans-unit.target: Proprio come in un gioco: puntate a un punteggio alto (migliaia di punti) e cercate di non perdere la vita.

trans-unit.resname: No score and no lives. You have to answer right to get some information (a feedback).
trans-unit.source: No score and no lives. You have to answer right to get some information (a feedback).
trans-unit.target: Nessun punteggio e nessuna vita. Devi rispondere correttamente per ottenere qualche informazione (un feedback).

trans-unit.resname: and information that will be very useful
trans-unit.source: and information that will be very useful
trans-unit.target: e informazioni che saranno molto utili

trans-unit.resname: No more attempts left. Please answer the question.
trans-unit.source: No more attempts left. Please answer the question.
trans-unit.target: Non ci sono più tentativi disponibili. rispondi alla domanda.

trans-unit.resname: You must upload or indicate the valid URL of an image
trans-unit.source: You must upload or indicate the valid URL of an image
trans-unit.target: Devi caricare o indicare l'URL valido di un'immagine

trans-unit.resname: You have to complete all the selected options
trans-unit.source: You have to complete all the selected options
trans-unit.target: Devi completare tutte le opzioni selezionate

trans-unit.resname: Are you sure you want to continue without including an image description? Without it the image may not be accessible to some users with disabilities, or to those using a text browser, or browsing the Web with images turned off.
trans-unit.source: Are you sure you want to continue without including an image description? Without it the image may not be accessible to some users with disabilities, or to those using a text browser, or browsing the Web with images turned off.
trans-unit.target: Sei sicuro di voler continuare senza includere una descrizione dell'immagine? Senza di esso, l'immagine potrebbe non essere accessibile ad alcuni utenti con disabilità, o a chi utilizza un browser di testo o naviga sul Web con le immagini disattivate.

trans-unit.resname: Create interactive challenges in which students progressively reveal sections of a concealed image and then choose the correct answer based on the visual clues.
trans-unit.source: Create interactive challenges in which students progressively reveal sections of a concealed image and then choose the correct answer based on the visual clues.
trans-unit.target: Crea sfide interattive in cui gli studenti rivelano progressivamente sezioni di un'immagine nascosta e poi scelgono la risposta corretta in base agli indizi visivi.

trans-unit.resname: Reveal the hidden image and choose the right answer.
trans-unit.source: Reveal the hidden image and choose the right answer.
trans-unit.target: Rivela l'immagine nascosta e scegli la risposta giusta.

trans-unit.resname: You used one clue. You can only get %s points.
trans-unit.source: You used one clue. You can only get %s points.
trans-unit.target: Hai usato un indizio. Puoi ottenere solo %s punti.

trans-unit.resname: You already used all the clues. You can only get %s points.
trans-unit.source: You already used all the clues. You can only get %s points.
trans-unit.target: Hai già usato tutti gli indizi. Puoi ottenere solo %s punti.

trans-unit.resname: Create activities in which the players, with some clues, will have to guess a character, an object or the solution to a problem.
trans-unit.source: Create activities in which the players, with some clues, will have to guess a character, an object or the solution to a problem.
trans-unit.target: Crea attività in cui i giocatori, con qualche indizio, dovranno indovinare un personaggio, un oggetto o la soluzione a un problema.

trans-unit.resname: Use the clues to guess the hidden answer for each question.
trans-unit.source: Use the clues to guess the hidden answer for each question.
trans-unit.target: Usa gli indizi per indovinare la risposta nascosta di ogni domanda.

trans-unit.resname: Choose files or drag them here.
trans-unit.source: Choose files or drag them here.
trans-unit.target: Scegli i file o trascinali qui.

trans-unit.resname: Click on Save when you finish
trans-unit.source: Click on Save when you finish
trans-unit.target: Clicca su Salva quando hai finito
La copertina del tuo video interattivo

trans-unit.resname: Write a text. You can add lists, links...
trans-unit.source: Write a text. You can add lists, links...
trans-unit.target: Scrivi un testo. Puoi aggiungere liste, collegamenti...

trans-unit.resname: Add an image with description (alternative text).
trans-unit.source: Add an image with description (alternative text).

trans-unit.resname: Write a question and some answers. Don't forget to choose the right one.
trans-unit.source: Write a question and some answers. Don't forget to choose the right one.
trans-unit.target: Scrivi una domanda e alcune risposte. Non dimenticare di scegliere quella corretta.

trans-unit.resname: Write a question and some answers. You can select more than one right answer.
trans-unit.source: Write a question and some answers. You can select more than one right answer.
trans-unit.target: Scrivi una domanda e alcune risposte. Puoi selezionare più di una risposta corretta.

trans-unit.resname: Write a text and strike through the words to complete. Check the spelling. It's case sensitive.
trans-unit.source: Write a text and strike through the words to complete. Check the spelling. It's case sensitive.
trans-unit.target: Scrivi un testo e barra le parole da completare. Controlla l'ortografia. Distingue maiuscole/minuscole.

trans-unit.resname: Write a text and strike through the words to complete. A dropdown menu (SELECT) will be displayed where those words are. You can also add more options.
trans-unit.source: Write a text and strike through the words to complete. A dropdown menu (SELECT) will be displayed where those words are. You can also add more options.
trans-unit.target: Scrivi un testo e barra le parole da completare. Verrà visualizzato un menu a tendina (SELEZIONA) dove si trovano quelle parole. Puoi anche aggiungere altre opzioni.

trans-unit.resname: Write some instructions and add pairs in the right order.
trans-unit.source: Write some instructions and add pairs in the right order.
trans-unit.target: Scrivi le istruzioni e aggiungi le coppie nell'ordine corretto.

trans-unit.resname: Write the wording and add elements to the list (in the right order).
trans-unit.source: Write the wording and add elements to the list (in the right order).
trans-unit.target: Scrivi il testo e aggiungi elementi alla lista (nell'ordine corretto).

trans-unit.resname: Write the text to be shown
trans-unit.source: Write the text to be shown

trans-unit.resname: Strike through the words to complete. It's case sensitive.
trans-unit.source: Strike through the words to complete. It's case sensitive.
trans-unit.target: Barra le parole da completare. Distingue maiuscole/minuscole.

trans-unit.resname: You can add more options to the dropdown lists (optional)
trans-unit.source: You can add more options to the dropdown lists (optional)
trans-unit.target: Puoi aggiungere più opzioni ai menu a tendina (facoltativo)

trans-unit.resname: Fill in at least two pairs.
trans-unit.source: Fill in at least two pairs.

trans-unit.source: Do not show this message again

trans-unit.target: Il video non è così lungo. Controlla l'orario di inizio/fine.

trans-unit.source: Set the time for the slide to be shown
trans-unit.target: Imposta il momento in cui mostrare la diapositiva

trans-unit.source: If you don't want the video to stop, set the time for the slide to be hidden

trans-unit.target: visualizza tutte le diapositive e rispondi a tutte le domande

trans-unit.source: Only one interactive video per page.

trans-unit.source: There should be at least one level.

trans-unit.resname: Please export the content to apply the rubric.

trans-unit.resname: Please write the text to show when right.

trans-unit.resname: Please write the text to show when wrong.
trans-unit.source: Please write the text to show when wrong.

trans-unit.resname: There cannot be 2 or more identical elements.
trans-unit.source: There cannot be 2 or more identical elements.
trans-unit.target: Non possono esserci 2 o più elementi identici.
Sovrapposizione di feedback sulla risposta corretta

trans-unit.resname: The right answer will be shown after this text.
trans-unit.source: The right answer will be shown after this text.
trans-unit.target: La risposta corretta verrà mostrata dopo questo testo.
Crea attività interattive per l'ordinamento del testo.

trans-unit.resname: Arrange the following texts in the correct order to complete the activity.
trans-unit.source: Arrange the following texts in the correct order to complete the activity.

trans-unit.resname: Write the elements in the right order:
trans-unit.source: Write the elements in the right order:

trans-unit.source: Please check all the answers in the right order

trans-unit.resname: You must indicate an image, a text or/and an audio for each card

trans-unit.resname: Create interactive activities in which players will have to select the correct multimedia cards.
trans-unit.source: Create interactive activities in which players will have to select the correct multimedia cards.
trans-unit.target: Crea attività interattive in cui i giocatori dovranno selezionare le schede multimediali corrette.

trans-unit.resname: You have ordered all the activities!
trans-unit.source: You have ordered all the activities!

trans-unit.resname: Create interactive activities in which players will have to order cards with images, texts and/or sounds.
trans-unit.source: Create interactive activities in which players will have to order cards with images, texts and/or sounds.

trans-unit.resname: Drag each letter to its correct position
trans-unit.source: Drag each letter to its correct position
trans-unit.target: Trascina ogni lettera nella posizione corretta

trans-unit.resname: You must indicate a name for all the selected players.
trans-unit.source: You must indicate a name for all the selected players.

trans-unit.resname: Do you want to restart the game?
trans-unit.source: Do you want to restart the game?

trans-unit.resname: The game has finished. The winner is %1. Do you want to play again?
trans-unit.source: The game has finished. The winner is %1. Do you want to play again?
trans-unit.target: Il gioco è terminato. Il vincitore è %1. Vuoi giocare di nuovo?

trans-unit.resname: Your score will be automatically saved after each throw.
trans-unit.source: Your score will be automatically saved after each throw.
trans-unit.target: Il tuo punteggio verrà salvato automaticamente dopo ogni lancio.

trans-unit.resname: The silence time is wrong. Check the video duration.
trans-unit.source: The silence time is wrong. Check the video duration.
trans-unit.target: Il tempo del silenzio è sbagliato. Controlla la durata del video.

trans-unit.resname: Roll the dice and answer the question until you get all the cheeses.
trans-unit.source: Roll the dice and answer the question until you get all the cheeses.
trans-unit.target: Lancia i dadi e rispondi alla domanda fino a prendere tutto il formaggio.

trans-unit.resname: Too many questions! The game can have a maximum of about 800 and 1200 questions. This number can vary a lot depending on the type of questions and the length of the questions, the answers, the URLs and the enriched text.
trans-unit.source: Too many questions! The game can have a maximum of about 800 and 1200 questions. This number can vary a lot depending on the type of questions and the length of the questions, the answers, the URLs and the enriched text.
trans-unit.target: Troppe domande! Il gioco può contenere un massimo di circa 800 e 1200 domande. Questo numero può variare molto a seconda del tipo di domande e della lunghezza delle domande, delle risposte, degli URL e del testo arricchito.

trans-unit.resname: Create an educational board game with different question types (test, order, definition) of different categories. From 1 to 4 players or teams.
trans-unit.source: Create an educational board game with different question types (test, order, definition) of different categories. From 1 to 4 players or teams.
trans-unit.target: Crea un gioco da tavolo educativo con diversi tipi di domande (test, ordine, definizione) di categorie differenti. Da 1 a 4 giocatori o squadre.

trans-unit.resname: This game may present accessibility problems for some users. You should provide an accessible alternative if the users need it.
trans-unit.source: This game may present accessibility problems for some users. You should provide an accessible alternative if the users need it.
trans-unit.target: Questo gioco può presentare problemi di accessibilità per alcuni utenti. Dovresti fornire un'alternativa accessibile se gli utenti ne hanno bisogno.

trans-unit.resname: You must provide a name for this topic.
trans-unit.source: You must provide a name for this topic.
trans-unit.target: Fornire un nome per questo argomento.

trans-unit.resname: You must indicate a name for all the selected topics.
trans-unit.source: You must indicate a name for all the selected topics.
trans-unit.target: È necessario fornire un nome per tutti gli argomenti selezionati.

trans-unit.resname: You must complete all the questions of all the selected topics correctly.
trans-unit.source: You must complete all the questions of all the selected topics correctly.

trans-unit.resname: SCORM grades can only be saved in Quiz mode

trans-unit.resname: Create interactive True or False quizzes.
trans-unit.source: Create interactive True or False quizzes.

trans-unit.resname: Answer all the questions in this quiz.
trans-unit.source: Answer all the questions in this quiz.

trans-unit.resname: Double click or type to see suggestions
trans-unit.source: Double click or type to see suggestions

trans-unit.resname: You found all the words. Your score is %s.

trans-unit.source: Add a paragraph at the end

trans-unit.source: Paste is now in plain text mode. Click again to toggle back to regular paste mode. After you paste something you will be returned to regular paste mode.

trans-unit.source: Id should start with a letter, followed only by letters, numbers, dashes, dots, colons or underscores.

trans-unit.source: The changes you made will be lost if you navigate away from this page.

trans-unit.source: The URL you entered seems to be an external link. Do you want to add the required http:// prefix?

trans-unit.source: Please do not overuse these effects.

trans-unit.resname: Hello again! Please enter your credentials.
trans-unit.source: Hello again! Please enter your credentials.

trans-unit.resname: This software is provided as a preview and should not be distributed. It is under development and is subject to substantial change. Consider the included information incomplete and use it with caution.
trans-unit.source: This software is provided as a preview and should not be distributed. It is under development and is subject to substantial change. Consider the included information incomplete and use it with caution.
trans-unit.target: Questo software è fornito come anteprima e non dovrebbe essere distribuito. È in fase di sviluppo ed è soggetta a cambiamenti sostanziali. Considera le informazioni incluse incomplete e usale con cautela.

trans-unit.resname: eXeLearning is a free software tool under the GNU Affero GPL that can be used to create educational interactive web contents. eXeLearning can generate interactive contents in different formats and it allows you to create easily navigable web pages. All the educational materials generated with eXeLearning can be exported in different digital formats, to be used independently or to integrate them into a LMS (Learning Management System) like Moodle.
trans-unit.source: eXeLearning is a free software tool under the GNU Affero GPL that can be used to create educational interactive web contents. eXeLearning can generate interactive contents in different formats and it allows you to create easily navigable web pages. All the educational materials generated with eXeLearning can be exported in different digital formats, to be used independently or to integrate them into a LMS (Learning Management System) like Moodle.
trans-unit.target: eXeLearning è uno strumento software libero sotto la GNU Affero GPL che può essere utilizzato per creare contenuti web interattivi e educativi. eXeLearning può generare contenuti interattivi in diversi formati e consente di creare pagine web facilmente navigabili. Tutti i materiali educativi generati con eXeLearning possono essere esportati in diversi formati digitali, per essere utilizzati indipendentemente o per integrarli in un LMS (Learning Management System) come Moodle.

trans-unit.resname: Someone else is editing this page. Please wait until they finish before adding new iDevices.
trans-unit.source: Someone else is editing this page. Please wait until they finish before adding new iDevices.
trans-unit.target: Qualcun altro sta modificando questa pagina. Attendi che finisca prima di aggiungere nuovi iDevices.

trans-unit.resname: Please wait for the project to fully load before importing.
trans-unit.source: Please wait for the project to fully load before importing.

trans-unit.target: ~Serán redirigidos automáticamente a la página de nivel superior.

trans-unit.resname: Preferences will be applied after refreshing the page.
trans-unit.source: Preferences will be applied after refreshing the page.
trans-unit.target: ~Las preferencias se aplicarán después de actualizar la página.

trans-unit.resname: Changes require a page reload to take effect. Please download your project first to avoid losing your work, then reload the page.
trans-unit.source: Changes require a page reload to take effect. Please download your project first to avoid losing your work, then reload the page.
trans-unit.target: ~Es necesario recargar la página para aplicar los cambios. Descarga tu proyecto primero para no perder trabajo. Luego recarga la página.

trans-unit.resname: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?
trans-unit.source: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?
trans-unit.target: ~Hai modifiche non salvate. Sei sicuro di voler uscire?
~El proyecto no está preparado para la edición colaborativa

trans-unit.resname: Your project is automatically saved in your browser. Use File > Export to download a copy.
trans-unit.source: Your project is automatically saved in your browser. Use File > Export to download a copy.
trans-unit.target: ~Tu proyecto se guarda automáticamente en tu navegador. Usa Archivo - Exportar para descargar una copia.

trans-unit.resname: Cannot save project to server because your storage quota has been exceeded. You can download the project locally.
trans-unit.source: Cannot save project to server because your storage quota has been exceeded. You can download the project locally.
trans-unit.target: ~No se puede guardar el proyecto en el servidor porque se ha excedido tu cuota de almacenamiento. Puedes descargar el proyecto en tu equipo.
~No se pudo cargar la API de YouTube

trans-unit.resname: The questions have been added successfully
trans-unit.source: The questions have been added successfully

trans-unit.resname: Microphone access was denied or unavailable.
trans-unit.source: Microphone access was denied or unavailable.
trans-unit.target: ~Se denegó el acceso al micrófono o micrófono no disponible.

trans-unit.resname: This might not work in this ePub reader
trans-unit.source: This might not work in this ePub reader
trans-unit.target: ~Esto podría no funcionar en este lector de ePub

trans-unit.source: This activity does not work in ePub format
trans-unit.target: ~Esta actividad no funciona en formato ePub

trans-unit.resname: The folder picker did not respond. This may happen when opening exported files directly from the filesystem (file:// protocol). Try opening the file through a local web server instead.
trans-unit.source: The folder picker did not respond. This may happen when opening exported files directly from the filesystem (file:// protocol). Try opening the file through a local web server instead.
trans-unit.target: ~El selector de carpetas no respondió. Esto puede ocurrir al abrir archivos exportados directamente desde tu equipo (protocolo file://). Intenta abrir el archivo a través de un servidor.

trans-unit.resname: No files were returned by the folder picker. This is a known limitation when opening exported files with the file:// protocol in some browsers. Try using a different browser or opening the file through a local web server.
trans-unit.source: No files were returned by the folder picker. This is a known limitation when opening exported files with the file:// protocol in some browsers. Try using a different browser or opening the file through a local web server.
trans-unit.target: ~El selector de carpetas no encontró archivos. Esta es una limitación conocida al abrir archivos exportados con el protocolo file:// en algunos navegadores. Intenta usar otro navegador o abre el archivo a través de un servidor web.

trans-unit.resname: Local mode: Due to browser security policy, you will need to select the folder from which you opened this file. On a web server this will not be necessary.
trans-unit.source: Local mode: Due to browser security policy, you will need to select the folder from which you opened this file. On a web server this will not be necessary.
trans-unit.target: ~Modo local: debido a la política de seguridad del navegador, tendrás que seleccionar la carpeta desde la que abriste este archivo. En un servidor web esto no será necesario.

trans-unit.resname: Your access to this project has been revoked.
trans-unit.source: Your access to this project has been revoked.
trans-unit.target: ~Tu acceso a este proyecto ha sido revocado.

trans-unit.resname: Create a new set without loading external files.
trans-unit.source: Create a new set without loading external files.
trans-unit.target: ~Crea un nuevo conjunto sin cargar archivos externos.

trans-unit.resname: Your set is empty. Use the "+ Add Category" button above to create the first category.
trans-unit.source: Your set is empty. Use the "+ Add Category" button above to create the first category.
trans-unit.target: ~Tu conjunto está vacío. Usa el botón "+ Añadir categoría" de arriba para crear la primera categoría.

trans-unit.resname: This set has unsaved changes. Close anyway?
trans-unit.source: This set has unsaved changes. Close anyway?
trans-unit.target: ~Este conjunto tiene cambios sin guardar. ¿Cerrar de todos modos?
~Falta el origen u origen no válido.
~No se encuentra la ventana de destino.

trans-unit.resname: Your set is empty. Start by adding a category.
trans-unit.source: Your set is empty. Start by adding a category.
trans-unit.target: ~Tu conjunto está vacío. Empieza añadiendo una categoría.

trans-unit.resname: Player compatible with .srt subtitles. Check only if using .srt subtitles.
trans-unit.source: Player compatible with .srt subtitles. Check only if using .srt subtitles.
trans-unit.target: ~Reproductor compatible con subtítulos SRT. Marca esta opción solo si usas subtítulos SRT.

trans-unit.resname: You made %s errors. You have %s attempts left. Do you want to try again?
trans-unit.source: You made %s errors. You have %s attempts left. Do you want to try again?
trans-unit.target: ~Has cometido %s errores. Te quedan %s intentos. ¿Quieres intentarlo de nuevo?

trans-unit.resname: You must close the edited questionnaire before saving the activity.
trans-unit.source: You must close the edited questionnaire before saving the activity.
trans-unit.target: ~Debes cerrar el cuestionario editado antes de guardar la actividad.

trans-unit.source: YouTube videos cannot be embedded in preview mode.
trans-unit.target: ~Los vídeos de YouTube no se pueden incrustar en visualización previa.

trans-unit.source: Hint or suggestion for the student

trans-unit.source: No indicators were selected for this activity.
trans-unit.target: ~No se seleccionaron indicadores para esta actividad.

trans-unit.resname: Framework data could not be loaded. Please verify the data file is available.
trans-unit.source: Framework data could not be loaded. Please verify the data file is available.
trans-unit.target: ~No se pudieron cargar los datos del marco. Verifica que el archivo de datos esté disponible.

trans-unit.resname: Framework data is still loading. Please wait.
trans-unit.source: Framework data is still loading. Please wait.
trans-unit.target: ~Todavía se están cargando los datos del marco. Por favor, espera...

trans-unit.resname: Use filters, search, or fullscreen to explore the framework. Indicators remain selected while filtering.
trans-unit.source: Use filters, search, or fullscreen to explore the framework. Indicators remain selected while filtering.
trans-unit.target: ~Usa filtros, búsqueda o pantalla completa para explorar el marco. Los indicadores permanecen seleccionados al filtrar.

trans-unit.resname: Unable to change framework. The previous data will remain loaded.
trans-unit.source: Unable to change framework. The previous data will remain loaded.
trans-unit.target: ~No se pudo cambiar el marco. Se mantendrán los datos anteriores.

trans-unit.resname: User not found. This may be because this person has not accessed eXeLearning yet and is not registered in the system. Ask them to log in before sharing.
trans-unit.source: User not found. This may be because this person has not accessed eXeLearning yet and is not registered in the system. Ask them to log in before sharing.
trans-unit.target: ~Utente non trovato. È possibile che questa persona non abbia ancora effettuato l'accesso a eXeLearning e non sia registrata nel sistema. Chiedigli di accedere prima di condividere.

trans-unit.resname: Some files in this content use blob: links, which only work on this page. If you paste this elsewhere, images or files may be missing. To reuse content with files, add them from the File Manager or clone the iDevice.
trans-unit.source: Some files in this content use blob: links, which only work on this page. If you paste this elsewhere, images or files may be missing. To reuse content with files, add them from the File Manager or clone the iDevice.
trans-unit.target: ~Alcuni file in questo contenuto utilizzano link blob: che funzionano solo su questa pagina. Se si incolla questo contenuto altrove, alcune immagini o file potrebbero mancare. Per riutilizzare contenuto con file, aggiungili dal Gestore file o clona l'iDevice.
